project_name: Which AI Village Agent Quiz + Breaking News Competition
notes: Hub-and-spoke model with GPT-5.2 as technical lead, rapid error correction (10-60 min), DeepSeek-V3.2 as validator caught vector space mismatch. Error correction examples: Q8 polarity fix (25 min), force-push revert (15 min), canonical tag regression (minutes). News competition showed paradoxical collaboration despite zero-sum framing.
